homepage.heroTitle: Clinical Massage Therapy, Delivered to Your Door
homepage.heroDesc: Outcome-driven deep tissue, Swedish, hot stone, aromatherapy, sensual & sports massage by Iryna Bereza — 10+ years of clinical experience. Same-day availability across Central London.

about.title: Meet Iryna Bereza
about.subtitle: Founder & Lead Therapist
about.bio: Iryna Bereza is the founder and lead therapist of The Bereza Method. With over 10 years of clinical experience, she has developed a unique approach that combines evidence-based physiotherapy techniques with intuitive bodywork.
about.bio2: Originally trained in Ukraine and further certified in London, Iryna holds qualifications in deep tissue massage, sports massage, Swedish massage, aromatherapy, and energy-based therapies. She is DBS-checked and fully insured.
credentials: VTCT Level 3 Diploma in Massage Therapy

faq.q: What happens during my first massage session?
faq.a: Your therapist arrives with a professional massage table, premium organic oils, and fresh linens. After a 5-10 minute consultation about your health history and goals, you undress to your comfort level in private. The treatment lasts the full booked duration. Afterwards, you receive personalised aftercare recommendations.

faq.q: Is it safe having a therapist come to my home?
faq.a: Yes. Iryna Bereza is DBS-checked, fully insured with professional indemnity coverage, and has 10+ years of clinical experience. Professional boundaries are maintained without exception.

faq.q: Can I book a same-day massage in London?
faq.a: Yes. Same-day appointments are available 7 days a week across Central London. Book before 2pm for best same-day availability. Hours are 8am to 8pm daily.

faq.q: How much does mobile massage cost in London?
faq.a: 30-minute sessions start from £35, 1-hour sessions from £55, 90-minute sessions from £75, and 2-hour sessions from £100. All prices include travel within Central London.

faq.q: What areas of London do you serve?
faq.a: We serve all Central London postcodes including Kensington, Chelsea, Mayfair, Knightsbridge, Paddington, Canary Wharf, Notting Hill, Soho, City of London, and more.
Deep tissue work involves firm pressure that may produce moments of productive discomfort. It should never feel sharp or unbearable. Pressure is always negotiated.

faq.q: Do you have two therapists for couples massage?
faq.a: Yes. The Bereza Method has two fully qualified, DBS-checked therapists. For couples massage, both arrive together. Each person receives a personalised treatment.
We are available 7 days a week, 8am to 8pm.

faq.q: What should I wear during the massage?
faq.a: Undress to your comfort level. You are covered by a professional drape at all times.

faq.q: How often should I book a massage?
faq.a: For stress management: fortnightly. For chronic pain: weekly for 3-4 weeks then fortnightly. For sports recovery: based on training schedule.
12+ hours before: full refund. Within 12 hours: 50% charge. No-shows: charged in full.

faq.q: Can you come to my hotel?
faq.a: Absolutely. We regularly deliver massage treatments in hotels and serviced apartments across Central London.

faq.q: What are the boundaries for sensual massage?
faq.a: Sensual massage is a professional therapeutic service focused on deep relaxation and body awareness. Professional boundaries are discussed before the session and respected throughout.

faq.q: Is divine alignment massage a religious practice?
faq.a: No. It is a holistic wellness treatment accessible to all beliefs and backgrounds.
Yes. We cover all of Paddington W2, Bayswater, and surrounding areas.
